If your browser won't render part of the page try reloading.



The Epstein Files



I Made Epstein's Text Messages Great Again (And You Should Read Them)



cryptadamus.substack.com/p/i-made-epsteins-text-messages-great



@mastodon  /  @substack  /  @twitter  /  @github



The following views of the underlying selection of Epstein Files are available:

        ➱ most interesting (the cream of the crop) 
        ➱ chronological curated (all types intermingled) 
        ➱ emailers curated (emails grouped by person of interest) 
        ➱ emailers (all emails grouped by person) 
        ➱ emails chronological (all emails chronological order) 
        ➱ people (one line biographies with some links) 
        ➱ signatures (email signatures/emojis and who uses them) 
        ➱ text messages (2025 Oversight tranche) 
        ➱ other (files that are not emails or texts) 
        ➱ notes (on the most interesting files) «you are here»
        ➱ phone numbers (called by Epstein's phones) 
        ➱ word count (of Epstein's communications) 
        ➱ doj files (raw OCR text 2026 DOJ tranche) 
        ➱ metadata (author bios, attribution explanations) 



       ************** Not All Epstein Files Are Here! **************       



This dataset includes everything from the 2025 Oversight tranche



as well as a curated selection of the 2026 DOJ tranche



with a particular focus on cryptocurrency



and women who speak Russian.
